name: fhir-validator
description: Real FHIR Validator CLI wrapper for validating example JSON resources in the blood pressure workspace.
guidance: Use `fhir-validator input/examples/Patient-bp-alice-smith.json input/examples/Observation-bp-alice-morning.json` through bash. The wrapper runs the real validator JAR with `-version 4.0.1 -tx n/a` by default.

name: hl7-jira-support
description: Support bundle for the HL7 Jira MCP server, including the Bun entrypoint and the real FHIR community search SQLite snapshot.
